data.title: Senator Tim Scott Says Crypto Market Structure Bill To Be Passed by August of This Year
data.description:
Republican Senator Tim Scott of South Carolina says a bill seeking to create a comprehensive regulatory framework for the digital asset space will become law later this year.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/04/14/senator-tim-scott-says-crypto-market-structure-bill-to-be-passed-by-august-of-this-year/

data.title: Bitcoin traders target $90K as apparent tariff exemptions ease US Treasury yields
data.description:
The 2-year and 10-year US Treasury yields dipped on Monday, April 14, after Bitcoin (BTC) closed its best weekly performance since the second week of January.  Bitcoin gained 6. 79% over the past week, but are enough factors aligned to support continued price upside? The 10-year treasury yield declined by 8. 2 basis points to 4
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/bitcoin-traders-target-90-k-as-apparent-tariff-exemptions-ease-us-treasury-yields?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Binance Founder CZ Denies Testifying Against Justin Sun in DOJ Deal
data.description:
Binance founder Changpeng “CZ” Zhao has denied accusations that he provided testimony against TRON founder Justin Sun as part of a plea deal with the U. S. Department of Justice (DOJ). CZ addressed these allegations through a series of posts on X
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/04/14/binance-founder-cz-denies-testifying-against-justin-sun-in-doj-deal/

data.title: Federal Reserve's Waller Discusses Impact of New Tariff Policies on U.S. Economy
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, Federal Reserve Governor Christopher Waller stated that the new tariff policies represent one of the most significant impacts on the U.S. economy in decades. If the current average tariff rate of 25% persists for some time, inflation could peak at nearly 5%. Should the rate decrease to 10%, inflation might peak at 3%.

In scenarios involving large-scale tariffs, Waller indicated a personal inclination towards earlier and more substantial interest rate cuts if there is a notable economic slowdown. Conversely, in situations with smaller tariffs, the Federal Reserve might adopt a more patient approach, potentially implementing rate cuts in the latter half of the year.

data.title: Anchorage Digital probed by top US AML task force, report
data.description:
In 2022, the US banking watchdog put Anchorage on notice for failing to meet various anti-money laundering regulations.
source: https://protos.com/anchorage-digital-probed-by-top-us-aml-task-force-report/

data.title: Binance Founder CZ Hits Back at 'Smear' Allegations He Gave Evidence Against Justin Sun in Plea Deal
data.description:
Citing unnamed sources, WSJ reported Friday that CZ committed to testifying against Sun in exchange for leniency.
source: https://decrypt.co/314716/binance-founder-cz-justin-sun-plea-deal

data.title: Crypto Giant Kraken Now Offers Commission-Free Stock Trading
data.description:
TL;DR Kraken enabled commission-free trading of over 11,000 stocks and ETFs for users in ten U. S. states, with plans to gradually expand access. The platform allows users to manage cryptocurrencies, stocks, stablecoins, and cash from a single account, with features like automatic reinvestment and fractional trading. The exchange aims to integrate traditional and digital assets. . . 
source: https://crypto-economy.com/crypto-giant-kraken-now-offers-commission-free-stock-trading/

data.title: Kraken expands beyond crypto, launches stock trading in the US
data.description:
Kraken is expanding into traditional finance by launching access to over 11,000 US-listed stocks and exchange-traded funds (ETFs), according to an April 14 statement. The crypto trading firm revealed that its users can now trade equities commission-free through Kraken Securities LLC, a newly launched FINRA-regulated arm of the exchange.
source: https://cryptoslate.com/kraken-expands-beyond-crypto-launches-stock-trading-in-the-us/

data.title: Whale Address Sells Bitcoin at a Loss, Reports BlockBeats
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, a whale address has recently redeemed 400 BTC, valued at $33.83 million, and sold them at a loss. This transaction occurred four hours ago, as monitored by Lookonchain.

Four months ago, the whale address purchased 2,000 BTC for $197.8 million at a price of $98,896 per Bitcoin. The selling activity began on March 11, with the address redeeming and selling BTC.

To date, the address has sold a total of 1,200 BTC for $98.6 million at an average price of $82,171 per Bitcoin, resulting in a total loss of $31.8 million.

data.title: A whale deposited 6 million USDC into Hyperliquid and went long on ETH with 5x leverage
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Lookonchain monitoring, about 50 minutes ago, a whale deposited 6 million USDC into Hyperliquid and went long on ETH with 5x leverage at a price of $1,624.44.
